title: Down Home
overview: A New York City executive returns to her hometown of Hadley Cove, Texas, a coastal fishing village, to help save her father's bait and tackle shop from her ex-boyfriend, a condominium developer.  Down Home is an American sitcom that aired on NBC from April 12, 1990 to August 10, 1991. Emmy Award winning actor Ted Danson served as series co-producer.
creator: Barton Dean

episodes.title: Down Home - Judith Ivey, Gedde Watanabe, Eric Allan Kramer
